title: Nvidia says its AI data center design runs hotter to use a lot less water
summary: Nvidia claims its Rubin generation liquid-cooled data center design significantly reduces water and power consumption compared to traditional cooling. However, the company has not addressed construction impacts, power generation requirements, or cost comparisons with conventional systems.
content:
Public pushback against data centers has emphasized their water and energy consumption, and now Nvidia is highlighting its claim that the Rubin generation reference design for a fully liquid-cooled data center has "eliminated massive amounts of power usage and pretty much all water usage." Still, it doesn't address all of the concerns around AI data centers, including during their construction, and for the power generation requirements of the massive facilities. Also, as Gizmodo points out, Nvidia's blog post doesn't mention the cost of building this style of data center vs. one using less efficient air cooling, but claims that "every cloud  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Nvidia 表示其人工智能数据中心设计运行温度更高，但水耗量大幅降低
zh.summary: Nvidia 声称其 Rubin 一代液冷数据中心设计相比传统冷却方式可显著降低水电消耗。但该公司尚未解决施工影响、发电需求或与传统系统的成本对比问题。

title: Tesla pushes back on Autopilot narrative after fatal Texas crash
summary: Tesla is disputing claims about its Autopilot system following a fatal Texas crash, though the vehicle's data logs are needed to determine whether the system was active, overridden, or malfunctioning.
content: Whether the Autopilot system was truly active, overridden, or malfunctioning likely won't be resolved until investigators finish combing through the vehicle's data logs.

zh.title: 特斯拉在德州致命事故后对 Autopilot 说法进行反驳
zh.summary: 在德州发生致命车祸后，特斯拉对关于其 Autopilot 系统的声称进行了质疑，尽管需要车辆数据日志来确定该系统是否处于活跃状态、被覆盖或发生故障。

title: Shareholders sue Uber’s board over sexual assaults, other incidents
summary: A Detroit pension fund is leading a shareholder lawsuit against Uber's board and management, alleging inadequate compliance measures that resulted in thousands of lawsuits related to sexual assaults and other incidents.
content: The lawsuit, led by a Detroit pension fund, alleges Uber's board and management has cut too many compliance corners, resulting in thousands of lawsuits.

summary: General Motors is installing robots at its flagship electric vehicle factory following layoffs of 1,300 workers, prompting union warnings about automation replacing human jobs in manufacturing.
content: US autoworkers union warns of robot automation as dark factory future looms.

summary: Kennedy Space Center is reportedly unprepared for the era of super-heavy rockets, as SpaceX plans to launch Starship every eight days from the facility.
content: SpaceX has told NASA it plans to launch Starship every eight days from Kennedy.

title: Valve describes just how brutal RAM negotiations are in 2026
summary: Valve's Steam Machine costs $1,049 for 512GB and $1,349 for 2TB without controllers, driven by severe component shortages and take-it-or-leave-it pricing from few RAM vendors like Samsung and Micron.
content:
Valve's Steam Machine finally has a price: a whopping $1,049 for the 512GB configuration or $1,349 for the 2TB version. And those are without bundled controllers, which drive up the cost more. 
The prices are so high in part because Valve isn't subsidizing the hardware, and the company has already indicated that the component crisis forced it to reconsider its initial pricing plans. In an interview with the YouTube channel Gamers Nexus, Valve engineers discussed the reality of sourcing RAM in 2026, with take-it-or-leave-it prices as memory and other components remain in short supply, from only a few vendors like Samsung, Micron, and SK Hyni …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Valve 描述 2026 年 RAM 谈判有多残酷
zh.summary: Valve 的 Steam Machine 不含控制器的价格为 512GB 款 $1,049，2TB 款 $1,349，受到严重的组件短缺和来自三星和美光等少数 RAM 供应商的要价不二定价驱动。

title: Man used massage gun on his tired eyeballs. It went as well as you'd expect.
summary: A man suffered retinal tears and bruising after using a massage gun on his eyes, illustrating the dangers of applying high-intensity massage devices to delicate ocular tissue.
content: He had retinal tears and bruises from squishing his eyeballs with the gun.

summary: A new form of agentic AI called 'the loop' enables swarms of AI agents to work continuously and autonomously in the background without human intervention.

title: Nvidia wants to cut data center water use, but that’s not the same as fixing AI’s water problem
summary: Nvidia's new cooling system reduces water consumption inside data centers, but fails to address AI's primary water usage issue: the water needs of fossil fuel power plants supplying electricity.
content: Nvidia announced a new cooling system that cuts water use inside the data center. But it does nothing to address AI's biggest water use — fossil fuel power plants.

title: AI is cursing renters with the promise of impossible homes
summary: AI-generated apartment listings are deceiving renters with fake photos and descriptions of non-existent or heavily altered properties, wasting time and emotional energy on viewing non-matching apartments.
content:
Joyce, a native New Yorker, didn't think finding her first solo apartment in the city would be easy. But she also didn't think it'd be "hell." After looking at a lot of tiny, overpriced places she described as "shitholes," Joyce found her dream apartment: a reasonably priced studio in Manhattan. 
"It was big and airy, and there was a fireplace," she said. The kitchen was small but well equipped and looked like it had been recently renovated. She dropped everything to see the apartment, and when she got there, she learned that five other women, all around her age, had viewings scheduled after hers.
"I get in, and it's not the same apartment …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: Following user outcry, AMD reinstates memory encryption in consumer CPUs
summary: AMD has reinstated memory encryption in consumer CPUs following widespread criticism that its removal was designed to push customers toward expensive enterprise chips. The reversal demonstrates the power of community pushback against perceived anti-consumer practices. Memory encryption is a critical security feature protecting sensitive data from privileged access.
content: Critics saw the move as an underhanded way to steer them toward more costly chips.

zh.title: 在用户强烈反对之后，AMD重新启用消费级CPU中的内存加密
zh.summary: AMD在广泛批评之后重新启用了消费级CPU中的内存加密。批评指出该功能的移除旨在推动客户购买昂贵的企业级芯片。这一反转展现了社区对反消费者行为的有力反击。内存加密是一项关键的安全功能，能够保护敏感数据免受特权访问。

title: The Apple Watch SE 3 is just $199 for Prime Day
summary: The Apple Watch SE 3 reaches an all-time low of $199 during Prime Day, delivering major upgrades including an always-on display, wrist-temperature sensor, and fast charging at unprecedented value.
content:
The Apple Watch SE 3 is at an all-time low of $199, making the sleeper hit of last year’s Apple Watches an even better value. While the Series 11 and Ultra 3 were iterative updates, the SE 3 was a wide-ranging glow-up that added an always-on display, gestures like double tap and wrist flick, a wrist-temperature sensor, 5G connectivity, fast charging, a speaker, and an upgraded processor that’ll support watchOS 27 when it arrives in the fall.
Apple Watch SE 3
The Apple Watch SE 3 is a major glow-up, adding an always-on display, wrist-temperature sensor, a more powerful processor, and fast-charging.

Where to Buy:

 $249 $199 at Amazon

This is the Apple Watch that I recommend for most people, unless you really want a watch with thinner bezels and EKG and atrial fibrillation detection. The 40mm size is also great if you have a smaller wrist. When I was testing the watch, I really didn’t feel any FOMO. But if advanced health features are a sticking point, the Apple Watch Series 11 is also $50 off for an all-time low price of $279. Just a note for bargain hunters: keep in mind that we’re expecting to see a Series 12 in a few months, while we won’t likely see an update to the SE line for at least another year. 
Read our Apple Watch SE 3 review.

title: The Steam Machine is the start of an even more expensive future for game consoles
summary: Global RAM shortages are driving rising costs across gaming hardware, with the Steam Machine's $1,049 price exemplifying an increasingly expensive console market that consumers must navigate.
content:
It's no secret that just about every aspect of video games is getting more expensive. Game consoles are getting regular price hikes, PC components are spiking in cost, and the golden age of affordable handhelds is over, all largely due to the global RAM shortage, which has had a similarly costly impact on PC gaming, including portable devices like the Steam Deck. This all led to some trepidation around the Steam Machine, Valve's latest attempt to bring the breadth and openness of PC gaming into a form factor designed for your living room. The fact that the device was delayed in February due specifically to the memory crisis only exacerbated  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Steam Machine预示着游戏机将步入更昂贵的时代
zh.summary: 全球RAM供应短缺推高了游戏硬件成本，Steam Machine的$1,049价格说明了消费者面临的日益昂贵的游戏机市场。

title: Google invests in A24 to build AI movie tools
summary: Google DeepMind is investing approximately $75 million in A24 to develop AI-powered movie production technologies, representing the tech company's first major equity investment in a film studio.
content:
The deal is reportedly non-exclusive, and will span “multiple projects over time.” | Image by The Verge	

Google's DeepMind AI lab is teaming up with A24 to develop new movie production technologies that aim to help future filmmakers "expand their storytelling possibilities." As part of this new research and development collaboration, The Wall Street Journal reports that Google is investing "around $75 million" into A24, marking the first time the search giant has taken a stake in a film studio.
"The collaboration pairs a world-leading research lab with the industry's most filmmaker-forward studio to help artists develop new workflows and techniques," Google said in its announcement blog. "This ensures the tools of the future are shaped by the  …
Read the full story at The Verge.

title: Valve is working with AMD to bring FSR 4 to the Steam Machine
summary: Valve is partnering with AMD to integrate FSR 4 upscaling technology into the Steam Machine, improving graphics rendering quality to better compete with console-class visual fidelity.
content:
The Steam Machine is a cool little console that's about as powerful as a PlayStation 5, according to my colleague Sean Hollister's in-depth review. But one area where it lags behind is with its earlier version of AMD FSR upscaler: It's just not as good as it should be. Yes, it can sharpen low-res graphics to make games look higher-res, but the PS5 (and especially the PS5 Pro) render a clearer image in motion with some games we compared.
That's not great news for the Steam Machine, especially since it's launching at $1,049 for the 512GB version - a higher price than anyone hoped for. But there is some hope that games on the console will look …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Valve与AMD合作为Steam Machine带来FSR 4

title: Here’s how you can reserve a Steam Machine
summary: Valve is accepting Steam Machine preorders through a randomized reservation system beginning Thursday, designed to ensure fair access and prevent bot exploitation during launch.
content:
The Steam Machine is here, but getting one is a little complicated. Valve is taking preorders using a reservation system, which is intended to make the process more fair and harder for bots to exploit. However, it's a bit different than the $5 reservations Valve used for the Steam Deck. 
Starting today, you can sign up for a chance to reserve the Steam Machine, choosing from four different options:
Steam Machine 512GB: $1,049 / $1,509 CAD / €1,039 / £879 / $1,609 AUD / 4,389 zlotys
Steam Machine 512GB with Steam Controller: $1,128 / $1,628 CAD / €1,108 / £938 / $1,728 AUD / 4,698 zlotys
Steam Machine 2TB: $1,349 / $1,919 CAD / €1,35 …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 如何预留Steam Machine

title: Valve will finally let you build your own Steam Machine with SteamOS for desktop
summary: Valve is enabling users to build custom Steam Machines by installing SteamOS 3.8 on their own PC hardware, providing an alternative for those unable to secure official Valve units.
content:
If you don't get lucky with Valve's Steam Machine reservation system, you can make your own Steam Machine instead. Valve says that "starting with the SteamOS 3.8 release, you can put together your own Steam Machine using whatever PC parts you want." SteamOS 3.8.10 launched last week with a slew of updates, including "improved compatibility with recent Intel and AMD platforms." Alongside that improved compatibility, Valve is giving gamers the green light to install SteamOS on their own desktops. 
In an interview with The Verge, Valve's Pierre-Loup Griffais said Valve has been "rolling out improvements to [SteamOS] so it's more compatible wit …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Valve最终将让你用SteamOS为桌面构建自己的Steam Machine

title: Valve explains why it isn’t subsidizing the Steam Machine
summary: Valve's $1,049 Steam Machine pricing reflects actual component costs without manufacturer subsidy, making it substantially more expensive than traditional consoles like the PS5 and Xbox Series X.
content:
But the Xbox Series X is kind of like two Steam Machines! | Photo: Kelsey McClellan / The Verge	

Valve finally announced the price of the Steam Machine, and like a lot of new gadgets these days, it's not cheap: It starts at $1,049 for a 512GB model, and a 2TB model costs $300 more. Configurations with a bundled Steam Controller cost an extra $79 each.
Despite Valve offering a console alternative with the Steam Machine - a compact piece of hardware that can easily hook up to your TV to play your Steam library - those prices mean the Machine is much more expensive than console counterparts like the PS5 ($599.99), Xbox Series X ($649.99), and PS5 Pro ($899.99) while performing similarly to a PS5. (Those console prices are also higher than …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Valve解释为什么不补贴Steam Machine
zh.summary: Valve的$1,049 Steam Machine价格反映了实际的组件成本，没有制造商补贴，使其比PS5和Xbox Series X等传统游戏机昂贵得多。

title: Valve prices the Steam Machine at $1,049
summary: Valve announced the Steam Machine will launch June 29 starting at $1,049, with randomized reservation selection beginning Thursday to ensure equitable buyer access.
content:
After months of waiting, Valve has finally announced that the Steam Machine, its new living room-friendly PC, will start at $1,049 and go on sale beginning June 29th.
You can now register your interest to buy a Steam Machine as part of a reservation system. To offer a fair playing field for people who want to buy one, Valve will randomize everyone in the queue on Thursday at 1PM ET. After that, anyone who registers their interest will be added to the end of the waitlist. The first emails giving people the opportunity to buy will go out on June 29th.
Valve will sell four configurations of the Steam Machine:
A 512GB model for $1,049 / $1,5 …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Valve将Steam Machine定价为$1,049
zh.summary: Valve宣布Steam Machine将于6月29日推出，起价$1,049，从周四开始进行随机预留选择，以确保公平的买家获取。

title: The Steam Machine is the most ambitious game console I’ve ever played
summary: The Steam Machine represents an ambitious reimagining of the game console as an open PC platform for living room gaming, fundamentally departing from the proprietary hardware model of traditional console makers.
content:
My first day with the Steam Machine was a mess. Instead of enjoying a worry-free game console, I spent hours troubleshooting what felt like a finicky PC. That's because the Steam Machine is a PC, with a very important twist.
Since the Magnavox Odyssey came out in 1972, game consoles have been built with the same basic goal: to effortlessly play proprietary games on a TV screen. Nintendo, Sony, and Microsoft have spent decades essentially selling the same product. A few consoles could do more, but the formula you know and love remains buy box, plug into TV, insert game, play.
The Steam Machine aims to be something bigger. It's a vision of a …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Steam Machine是我玩过的最雄心勃勃的游戏机
zh.summary: Steam Machine代表了将游戏机重新想象为客厅游戏的开放PC平台的雄心勃勃之举，从根本上背离了传统游戏机制造商的专有硬件模式。

title: SpaceX inks compute deal with Reflection AI, an open source AI lab
summary: SpaceX signed a $150 million monthly contract with Reflection AI, an open-source AI lab, providing access to Nvidia's latest GB300 AI chips at its Colossus 2 data center in Memphis through 2029. The multi-year deal reflects surging demand for cutting-edge AI compute infrastructure. The partnership positions SpaceX as a major player in the competitive AI compute market.
content: Reflection AI will pay $150 million a month beginning July 1, 2026 through 2029 for immediate access to Nvidia's latest GB300 AI chips and supporting hardware across SpaceX's Colossus 2 data center near Memphis, Tennessee.

zh.title: SpaceX与开源AI实验室Reflection AI签署计算协议
zh.summary: SpaceX与开源AI实验室Reflection AI签署了一份每月1.5亿美元的合同，为其位于孟菲斯的Colossus 2数据中心提供英伟达最新GB300 AI芯片的访问权限，合同有效期至2029年。这项多年协议反映了对尖端AI计算基础设施需求的激增。这一合作伙伴关系使SpaceX成为竞争激烈的AI计算市场中的主要参与者。

title: Lucid lays off 1,500 workers in second big cut of the year
summary: Lucid Motors announced its second major workforce reduction of 2026, laying off 1,500 employees as part of a plan to "simplify the company." The cuts reflect the electric vehicle manufacturer's ongoing financial pressure and operational restructuring. These layoffs represent significant headcount reductions for a company struggling to scale production and achieve profitability.
content: The cuts and redundancies are part of a plan to "simplify the company," the CEO says.

zh.title: Lucid今年第二次大规模裁员，涉及1500名员工
zh.summary: Lucid Motors宣布2026年第二次重大员工削减，裁员1500名员工，作为"简化公司"计划的一部分。这些裁员反映了这家电动汽车制造商持续的财务压力和运营重组。对于这家正在努力扩大生产并实现盈利的公司而言，这些裁员代表了显著的人员削减。

title: WhatsApp gets new chief as Meta taps India’s CRED founder Kunal Shah and invests $900M in startup
summary: Meta appointed Kunal Shah, founder of Indian fintech startup CRED, as WhatsApp's new leader, replacing Will Cathcart who is moving to another Meta role. Meta simultaneously invested $900 million in CRED, signaling confidence in both Shah's leadership and the Indian fintech sector. The change reflects WhatsApp's strategic focus on expanding commerce and payment capabilities.
content: WhatsApp gets a new boss, as Will Cathcart moves to a new role at Meta, while Shah steps down as CEO of Indian fintech giant CRED to replace Cathcart.

zh.title: Meta任命印度金融科技初创CRED创始人库纳尔·沙阿为WhatsApp新首席执行官，投资9亿美元
zh.summary: Meta任命印度金融科技初创公司CRED的创始人库纳尔·沙阿为WhatsApp的新领导者，接替转向Meta其他职位的威尔·卡特。Meta同时向CRED投资9亿美元，表明对沙阿领导力和印度金融科技部门的信心。这一变化反映了WhatsApp在扩展商务和支付能力方面的战略重点。

title: A US military exercise in space got underway with barely anyone noticing
summary: The U.S. Space Force conducted a military exercise designed to accelerate satellite deployment and operational response times in orbit with minimal public attention. The effort reflects Pentagon goals to reduce the timeline from years to weeks, days, or hours for fielding new space capabilities. This initiative underscores growing concerns about space security and rapid deployment needs.
content: The Space Force wants to cut the time to field new satellites from years to weeks, days, or hours.

zh.title: 美国军方的太空军事演习在几乎无人关注的情况下展开
zh.summary: 美国太空军进行了一次军事演习，旨在加快卫星部署和轨道上的作战反应时间，但几乎没有获得公众关注。这一努力反映了五角大楼的目标，即将部署新太空能力的时间表从数年缩短到数周、数天或数小时。这一举措凸显了对太空安全和快速部署需求日益增长的关切。

title: 1,250 hp hybrid Corvette shatters the Pikes Peak production record
summary: A hybrid-powered Corvette with 1,250 horsepower set a new production vehicle record at the Pikes Peak International Hill Climb. The achievement demonstrates advances in hybrid performance technology and validates the legendary high-altitude race as a demanding test of vehicle engineering and driver capability. The record highlights the resurgence of performance-focused automotive innovation.
content: The high-altitude race is a unique test of car and driver.

zh.title: 1,250马力混合动力克尔维特打破派克峰产量纪录
zh.summary: 一台1,250马力的混合动力克尔维特在派克峰国际爬山赛中创造了新的量产车纪录。这一成就展示了混合动力性能技术的进步，并验证了这场传奇性高海拔赛事对车辆工程和驾驶员能力的严格考验。这一纪录突显了专注于性能的汽车创新的复兴。

title: Instagram looks to take on streaming services with longer-form, episodic and live formats for its TV app
summary: Instagram is expanding its TV app with longer-form, episodic, and live content to directly compete with streaming services like Netflix and Amazon Prime Video. The shift reflects Meta's ambitions to capture living room audiences and extend engagement on its platforms. Instagram is positioning itself as a direct competitor to dedicated streaming services for entertainment consumption.
content: Instagram is coming for streaming services like Netflix and Amazon Prime Video as it sets its ambitions for living room viewing.

zh.title: Instagram 通过电视应用的长篇、剧集和直播格式来挑战流媒体服务
zh.summary: Instagram 正在扩展其电视应用，提供长篇、剧集和直播内容，直接与 Netflix 和 Amazon Prime Video 等流媒体服务竞争。这一转变反映了 Meta 对争夺客厅受众和延长平台用户参与度的野心。Instagram 正在将自己定位为与专业流媒体服务竞争的直接对手，争夺娱乐消费市场。

title: This former hacker saw the light—and now wants to collect all of it
summary: A former hacker has pivoted to pursuing a major technological or scientific endeavor focused on collecting light, which the subject describes as one of humanity's most important questions. The story likely relates to renewable energy, solar technology, or breakthrough physics research. This represents a significant career shift from cybersecurity to potentially transformative clean energy work.
content: "I don’t know of a bigger question we can answer as humans."

zh.title: 这位前黑客看到了光明——现在想收集所有的光
zh.summary: 一位前黑客转向追求一项重大的技术或科学工作，专注于收集光，这被认为是人类最重要的问题之一。这个故事可能与可再生能源、太阳能技术或突破性物理研究有关。这代表了从网络安全到潜在具有变革意义的清洁能源工作的重大职业转变。

title: The founder conference built for growth: TechCrunch Founder Summit pass rates increase June 26
summary: TechCrunch is offering early-bird discounts of up to $190 on passes to its 2026 Founder Summit conference scheduled for November 4 in Boston, with pricing increasing after June 26. The conference is specifically designed for founders and emphasizes growth strategies. Early registration provides substantial savings for entrepreneurs planning to attend.
content: Save up to $190 on your pass to TechCrunch Founder Summit 2026 by June 26, 11:59 p.m. PT. Designed for founders first on November 4 in Boston. Register today.

zh.title: 为增长而构建的创始人大会：TechCrunch 创始人峰会门票价格 6 月 26 日上调
zh.summary: TechCrunch 为其 2026 年创始人峰会（11 月 4 日在波士顿举行）的通票提供高达 190 美元的早鸟折扣，6 月 26 日后价格将上调。该大会专为创始人设计，强调增长战略。早期注册为计划参加的企业家提供了实质性的优惠。

title: Apple’s AirPods Max 2 are $150 off for the first time
summary: Apple's AirPods Max 2 are now available at $399.99, a $150 discount marking the lowest price since launch. The headphones feature upgraded audio processing and support for new features like live translation, though they continue to lack a power button and have limited functionality outside Apple's ecosystem.
content:
The AirPods Max 2 have some updates on the inside, but look identical to the original AirPods Max. | Photo by Amelia Holowaty Krales / The Verge	

Walmart has the Apple AirPods Max 2 in every color discounted to $399.99 (normally $549) during Walmart Deals, the lowest price we’ve seen yet by a long shot. Amazon currently has the starlight color selling at this price. In our review, we praised Apple’s latest over-ear headset for its excellent sound quality, impressive noise cancellation, and premium build quality. An upgraded amplifier gives some extra oomph to the same drivers that are in the first-gen AirPods Max with USB-C, and the new processing chip supports features like live translation and conversation awareness.
AirPods Max 2

Where to Buy:

 $549 $399.99 at Amazon
 $549 $399.99 at Walmart

Unfortunately, this incremental update missed the opportunity to solve some of the previous version’s biggest flaws. For example, they don’t have a power button, so you’ll need to use the carrying case to put them to sleep, and they lose most of their unique functionality when connected to anything other than an iOS device. The price is usually a sticking point as well, but this discount brings them in line with our favorite noise-cancelling headset, the Sony WH-1000XM6 (read our hands-on impressions).
Read our Apple AirPods Max 2 review.

zh.title: Apple AirPods Max 2 首次降价150美元
zh.summary: Apple的AirPods Max 2现以399.99美元的价格提供，这是自发布以来的最低价，优惠150美元。这款耳机具有升级的音频处理功能，支持实时翻译等新功能，但仍然缺少电源按钮，在Apple生态系统外的功能有限。

title: How Anthropic may have talked itself into an AI export ban
summary: Anthropic's extensive public warnings about advanced AI dangers may have influenced policymakers to consider export restrictions on AI capabilities, contrasting with competitor OpenAI's more optimistic messaging. The analysis examines how corporate communication around AI risks can directly shape regulatory policy. This highlights the regulatory consequences of public positioning on AI safety.
content: The company warned about dangers of advanced AI far more than rival OpenAI.

zh.title: Anthropic如何通过言论可能为自己招致AI出口禁令
zh.summary: Anthropic关于先进AI危险的广泛公开警告可能影响了政策制定者对AI能力出口限制的考虑，与竞争对手OpenAI更乐观的信息形成对比。分析表明企业对AI风险的公开沟通可直接影响监管政策。这突出了关于AI安全公开立场的监管后果。

title: Lucid Motors’ new CEO cuts 18% of staff to ‘simplify the company’
summary: Lucid Motors' new CEO announced an 18% workforce reduction and the elimination of a production shift to streamline operations. The cost-cutting measures aim to align manufacturing capacity with current market demand as the electric vehicle maker faces financial pressures.
content: The company is also eliminating a production shift at its Arizona factory to align "production plans with anticipated demand."

zh.title: Lucid Motors新任首席执行官裁减18%员工以"简化公司"
zh.summary: Lucid Motors的新任首席执行官宣布裁减18%的劳动力并取消一班次生产以简化运营。这些成本削减措施旨在使制造能力与当前市场需求相适应，因为这家电动车制造商正面临财务压力。

title: Seedcamp raises $320M for its new fund to expand its US footprint
summary: Early-stage investor Seedcamp announced a $320 million new fund after 18 years of focusing exclusively on European startups. The capital signals the firm's strategic expansion into the United States market, marking a significant shift in geographic focus.
content: After 18 years of focusing on Europe, early-stage investor Seedcamp said that it has raised $320 million for its latest fund which will see it expanding its presence in the United States.

zh.title: Seedcamp筹集3.2亿美元新基金以扩大美国业务
zh.summary: 早期投资者Seedcamp在专注欧洲初创公司18年后宣布推出3.2亿美元的新基金。这笔资本象征着该公司进军美国市场的战略性扩张，标志着地理布局重点的重大转变。

title: Klue hack results in data breach at several cybersecurity firms
summary: A breach at market research firm Klue has exposed data held by multiple cybersecurity companies including Huntress, HackerOne, Jamf, Recorded Future, and Tanium. The incident highlights the risks vendors face when handling sensitive information from security-focused clients.
content: Huntress, HackerOne, Jamf, Recorded Future, and Tanium are among the cybersecurity companies that had data stolen following an earlier breach at market research firm Klue.

zh.title: Klue黑客攻击导致多家网络安全公司数据泄露
zh.summary: 市场研究公司Klue的一次数据泄露事件暴露了多家网络安全公司(包括Huntress、HackerOne、Jamf、Recorded Future和Tanium)持有的数据。该事件突显了供应商在处理来自安全专业客户的敏感信息时面临的风险。

title: Wyze’s new smart scale can break down your body composition for less than $80
summary: Wyze launched a $79.98 smart scale offering body composition analysis, undercutting its premium $119.98 Ultra model by removing Wi-Fi connectivity and using a simpler display. The lower-cost option makes body composition tracking more accessible to budget-conscious consumers.
content:
Seven months after introducing its $119.98 Ultra BodyScan smart scale, Wyze announced a cheaper $79.98 alternative available today that makes a few compromises to shave $40 off the price. There's no Wi-Fi, but you can sync the BodyScan's measurements to Apple Health and Google Fit by connecting to the Wyze mobile app over Bluetooth. And instead of a customizable LCD screen, the new scale uses a simpler 4.7-inch LED display to show your health stats. But the new Wyze Scale BodyScan still features a retractable tethered handle with four additional electrodes so it can provide a more detailed breakdown of health metrics for your legs, arms, and …
Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: Wyze推出新款智能体重秤，不到80美元可分析身体成分
zh.summary: Wyze推出了一款售价79.98美元的智能体重秤，提供身体成分分析功能。通过移除Wi-Fi连接和使用更简单的显示屏，它大幅低于价格119.98美元的高端Ultra型号。这一低成本选项使身体成分跟踪对预算有限的消费者更加便利。

title: Read this before you vibe-code another app
summary: A developer discovered a hidden SQL injection vulnerability in a hastily created website months after launch, highlighting security risks when rapid prototyping prioritizes speed over secure coding practices. The incident reflects how 'vibe coding' can create blind spots, particularly for developers new to security considerations.
content:
Bob Starr was delighted with his vibe-coded website. "Boomberg" showed how much US tax money is going to tech companies, and Starr launched it online immediately after making it. It wasn't until months after the site went live that he realized there was a problem: a hidden SQL injection risk. It could've left the site open for an attacker to read or alter data they shouldn't have access to. 
"It was just a glaring oversight on my part. It was a complete blindspot in my state of learning this new technology and understanding it, and I'm sure there are others making the same mistake," said Starr, a project manager in the tech sector.

"It was …

Read the full story at The Verge.

zh.title: 在你进行下一个"感觉编程"之前先读读这个
zh.summary: 一名开发者在网站启动数月后发现了一个隐藏的SQL注入漏洞，该网站是仓促创建的。这凸显了当快速原型制作优先考虑速度而非安全编码实践时的安全风险。该事件反映了"感觉编程"如何能造成盲点，特别是对于对安全考虑不太熟悉的开发者。

title: Ethan Thornton is trying to do everything all at once
summary: Ethan Thornton's company Mach is taking a distinctive approach that sets it apart from competitors in its space. The strategy involves tackling multiple objectives simultaneously, reflecting an ambitious business model that differs sharply from how peers operate.
content: Mach's approach differs sharply from some of its peers.

zh.title: Ethan Thornton试图同时做所有事情
zh.summary: Ethan Thornton的公司Mach采取了一种独特的方法，使其与同领域的竞争对手区别开来。该战略涉及同时处理多个目标，反映了一种雄心勃勃的商业模式，与同行的运营方式有很大不同。
